name: Pastry for 9-inch One Crust Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the shortening into the flour and salt until the mixture consists of small pea-sized particles.
2. Sprinkle in water, about 1 tablespoon at a time, tossing with a fork until all flour is moistened and the pastry almost cleans the sides of the bowl (up to 2 teaspoons of water may be added if necessary).
3. Gather the pastry into a ball and shape it into a flattened round on a lightly floured cloth-covered board.
4. Roll the pastry to a size larger than the inverted pie plate by 9 inches by 1 1/4 inches.
5. Fold the pastry into quarters and place in the plate.
6. Unfold and ease the pastry into the plate, pressing firmly against the bottom and sides.
7. Trim the edge of the pastry 1 inch from the rim of the plate.
8. Fold and roll the pastry under, even with the plate; flute.
